name: Chocolate-Mint Mousse
recipeIngredient: 5 tablespoons Creme de menthe (Green or White)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate eggs, placing whites in a large bowl and yolks in a small bowl. Reserve half of the chocolate pieces. In a large glass bowl, combine the remaining chocolate and butter. Microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes, stirring until well blended.
2. Beat in yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition. Let cool, stirring occasionally, for about 15 minutes, or until slightly thickened. Stir in 5 tablespoons of Creme de menthe. With an electric mixer on high speed, beat egg whites until stiff and moist peaks form. In the same bowl, beat cream until stiff. Fold the egg whites and half of the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture. Cover; refrigerate mousse and remaining cream until ready to serve.
3. Meanwhile, in a small glass bowl, place the reserved chocolate pieces. Microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes, or until melted. On an foil-lined tray, spread the melted chocolate within a 6-inch circle. Refrigerate for 45 minutes; with a knife, cut the circle into 6 equal wedges.
4. To serve: With an electric mixer on high speed, beat the reserved whipped cream with the remaining Creme de menthe. Pipe swirls into pastry bags fitted with a 1/2-inch star tip. Pipe 6 swirls on mousse. Between each swirl, press a chocolate wedge slightly into the mousse to stand upright. Garnish with fresh mint, if desired. Makes 10 servings.
